activities.title: 3 Moves for Anger
activities.target: Use 3-step physical release for anger (stomp, push wall, squeeze)
activities.script_parent: When mad: 1) Stomp feet 10 times, 2) Push against wall 10 seconds, 3) Squeeze stress ball hard. Then breathe.
activities.script_child: Let's get that mad energy out safely!
activities.success_criteria: Completes all 3 moves when offered during anger 3/5 times
activities.generalization: At home, school if appropriate space, anywhere safe

activities.title: Count Down from Panic
activities.script_parent: Say: 5 things you see, 4 you can touch, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste. Slows panic. Do it with them at first.
activities.script_child: Let's ground your body. Tell me what you notice.
activities.success_criteria: Completes technique with 'next sense' prompts or less 3/5 panic moments
activities.generalization: During anxiety, before tests, in overwhelming situations

activities.title: Comfort Kit
activities.target: Create and use personalized comfort kit with 5 sensory items
activities.script_parent: Make kit: soft item, fidget, photo of loved one, stress ball, favorite smell. When upset: 'Use your kit!'
activities.script_child: Your comfort kit is here. Pick what helps.
activities.success_criteria: Uses 2+ items from kit when upset 4/5 opportunities
activities.generalization: At home, portable kit for school/travel

activities.title: Safe Space Map
activities.target: Identify and go to 3 safe spaces (home, school, community)
activities.script_parent: Create map together: bedroom calm corner, school counselor, library quiet spot. Practice going to each!
activities.script_child: Where can you go when you need a break?
activities.success_criteria: Goes to identified safe space when upset 3/5 times

activities.title: Worry Timer
activities.target: Use 5-minute worry time to contain anxious thoughts
prompting_hierarchy: prompt to stop when timer ends
activities.script_parent: Set 5-min timer. 'Worry time!' Talk/write worries. When timer beeps: 'Worry time's over. Let's do something else.'
activities.script_child: You have 5 minutes to worry, then we move on.
activities.success_criteria: Uses worry time and stops worrying (or redirects) when timer ends 3/5 times
activities.generalization: Before bed, during high-anxiety periods, as needed

variants.follow-up: put away paper, do something fun

activities.title: Talk to a Helper
activities.target: Identify and approach trusted adult when emotions are big
activities.script_parent: Make list of helpers: mom, dad, teacher, counselor. Practice: 'I need help. I feel [emotion].' Respond immediately!
activities.script_child: Who can you talk to? Go find them and tell them how you feel.
activities.success_criteria: Approaches helper and states emotion 3/5 big feeling moments
activities.generalization: At home, school, extended family, community

activities.title: Aftercare Plan
activities.script_parent: After big feelings calm: 1) Rest quietly 5 min, 2) Talk about what happened (optional), 3) Hug/reconnect. No punishment, just reset.
activities.script_child: Let's help your body and brain recover together.
activities.success_criteria: Completes all 3 steps with verbal prompts 4/5 post-meltdown occasions
